title: dendrobium × vonpaulsenianum
intro: Dendrobium × vonpaulsenianum is a rare and exotic orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, resulting from a hybridization of Dendrobium cuthbertsonii and Dendrobium aphyllum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its stem, which is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and coughs. The health benefits of Dendrobium × vonpaulsenianum include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-bacterial and anti-viral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's stem is often dried and processed into a powder or tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
